items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，prompts.chat这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch

items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: ELF: Embedded Language Flows
items.summary: Diffusion and flow-based models have become the de facto approaches for generating continuous data, e.g., in domains such as images and videos. Their success has attracted growing interest in applying them to language modeling. Unlike their image-domain counterparts, today's leading diffusion langua...
items.summary_cn: 扩散和基于流的模型已成为生成连续数据的事实方法，例如在图像和视频等领域。他们的成功吸引了越来越多的人将其应用于语言建模。与他们的图像域同行不同，当今领先的扩散语言...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Variational Inference for Lévy Process-Driven SDEs via Neural Tilting
items.title_cn: 通过神经倾斜对Lévy过程驱动的SDE进行变分推断
items.summary: Modelling extreme events and heavy-tailed phenomena is central to building reliable predictive systems in domains such as finance, climate science, and safety-critical AI. While Lévy processes provide a natural mathematical framework for capturing jumps and heavy tails, Bayesian inference for Lévy-d...
items.summary_cn: 模拟极端事件和重尾现象对于在金融、气候科学和安全关键型人工智能等领域建立可靠的预测系统至关重要。虽然Lévy过程为捕获跳跃和重尾提供了自然的数学框架，但Lévy-d的贝叶斯推断...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Confidence-Guided Diffusion Augmentation for Enhanced Bangla Compound Character Recognition
items.title_cn: 用于增强孟加拉语复合字符识别的置信度引导扩散增强
items.summary: Recognition of handwritten Bangla compound characters remains a challenging problem due to complex character structures, large intra-class variation, and limited availability of high-quality annotated data. Existing Bangla handwritten character recognition systems often struggle to generalize across...
items.summary_cn: 由于字符结构复杂、班级内差异大以及高质量注释数据的可用性有限，手写孟加拉语复合字符的识别仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有的孟加拉文手写字符识别系统通常难以泛化...
items.comment: 开源是好事，能不能用起来、改起来，才是衡量价值的标准。

items.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash - Google's Fast Model

items.comment: 又是一个'史上最强'，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation

items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。
